Each time this unit is selected to shoot, you can roll one D6:
- On a 1-2, this unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.
- On a 3-4, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit.
- On a 5-6, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit.

other.description: While the Waaagh! is active for your army, this model's 'uge choppa has a Damage characteristic of 3.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Big shoota; ’Uge choppa.

other.name: Blastajet Attack Run
other.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that cannot FLY, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

other.name: Blastajet Force Field
other.description: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save, but it loses the **^^Grenades^^** keyword.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Smasha gun; Twin wazbom mega-kannon; Twin tellyport mega-blasta; Twin supa-shoota; Armoured hull.

other.name: Da Jump (Psychic)
other.description: Once per turn, at the end of your Movement phase, one WEIRDBOY from your army can use this ability. If it does, roll one D6: on a 1, that WEIRDBOY’s unit suffers D6 mortal wounds; on a 2+, remove this WEIRDBOY’s unit from the battlefield and set it up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

other.name: Waaagh! Energy
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Strength and Damage characteristics of this model’s ’Eadbanger weapon for every 5 models in that unit (rounding down), but while that unit contains 10 or more models, that weapon has the **[HAZARDOUS]** ability.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Weirdboy staff; ’Eadbanger.

other.name: Roar of Mork (Psychic)
other.description: In your opponent’s Command phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this **^^Psyker^^** and roll one D6: on a 1, this **^^Psyker^^**’s unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the start of your opponent’s next Command phase, that enemy unit is confrazzled. While a unit is confrazzled, each time a Battle-shock or Leadership test is taken for it, subtract 2 from that test.

other.name: Unstable Oracle
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s Eyez of Mork weapon for every 5 models in that unit (rounding down), but while that unit contains 10 or more models, that weapon has the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Eyez of Mork; Close combat weapon.

other.name: Super Runts
other.description:
While this model is leading a unit:
- Models in that unit have the Scouts 9" ability.
- Each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.
- Each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

other.name: Special Dose
other.description: While the Waaagh! is active for your army, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this model’s unit.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Da Grabzappa; Squigstoppa.
